Class ForeignFunctions

java.lang.Object
oshi.ffm.ForeignFunctions
public abstract class ForeignFunctions extends Object
Base class providing utility methods for working with the Java Foreign Function and Memory (FFM) API.

Subclasses use these helpers to load native libraries and frameworks, create downcall handles, and read data from native memory segments.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaBooleanCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a boolean.
    static interface 
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaCallable<T>
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns an object.
    static interface 
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a double.
    static interface 
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaIntCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns an int.
    static interface 
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaLongCallable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and returns a long.
    static interface 
    ForeignFunctions.ArenaRunnable
    Represents an operation that uses a confined Arena and does not return a value.

  • Constructor Details

    • ForeignFunctions

      protected ForeignFunctions()
      Not intended for instantiation.

  • Method Details

    • callInArenaOrDefault

      public static <T> T callInArenaOrDefault(ForeignFunctions.ArenaCallable<T> callable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message, T defaultValue)
      Executes an operation in a confined arena, returning a default value if the operation throws.

      This helper centralizes the common FFM call pattern where temporary native memory is scoped to a confined arena and failures from method-handle invocation or native binding are logged at the caller's chosen level. The provided arena is closed before this method returns, so returned objects must not depend on memory allocated from it.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the return type
      Parameters:
      callable - the operation to execute
      logger - the logger for the calling class
      level - the level at which to log thrown failures
      message - the message to log if the operation throws
      defaultValue - the value to return if the operation throws
      Returns:
      the operation result, or defaultValue if the operation throws

    • callInArenaIntOrDefault

      public static int callInArenaIntOrDefault(ForeignFunctions.ArenaIntCallable callable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message, int defaultValue)
      Executes an int-returning operation in a confined arena, returning a default value if the operation throws.

      Use this primitive-specialized variant to avoid boxing when wrapping FFM calls whose result is an int. The provided arena is closed before this method returns.

      Parameters:
      callable - the operation to execute
      logger - the logger for the calling class
      level - the level at which to log thrown failures
      message - the message to log if the operation throws
      defaultValue - the value to return if the operation throws
      Returns:
      the operation result, or defaultValue if the operation throws

    • callInArenaLongOrDefault

      public static long callInArenaLongOrDefault(ForeignFunctions.ArenaLongCallable callable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message, long defaultValue)
      Executes a long-returning operation in a confined arena, returning a default value if the operation throws.

      Use this primitive-specialized variant to avoid boxing when wrapping FFM calls whose result is a long. The provided arena is closed before this method returns.

      Parameters:
      callable - the operation to execute
      logger - the logger for the calling class
      level - the level at which to log thrown failures
      message - the message to log if the operation throws
      defaultValue - the value to return if the operation throws
      Returns:
      the operation result, or defaultValue if the operation throws

    • callInArenaDoubleOrDefault

      public static double callInArenaDoubleOrDefault(ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable callable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message, double defaultValue)
      Executes a double-returning operation in a confined arena, returning a default value if the operation throws.

      Use this primitive-specialized variant to avoid boxing when wrapping FFM calls whose result is a double. The provided arena is closed before this method returns.

      Parameters:
      callable - the operation to execute
      logger - the logger for the calling class
      level - the level at which to log thrown failures
      message - the message to log if the operation throws
      defaultValue - the value to return if the operation throws
      Returns:
      the operation result, or defaultValue if the operation throws

    • callInArenaBooleanOrDefault

      public static boolean callInArenaBooleanOrDefault(ForeignFunctions.ArenaBooleanCallable callable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message, boolean defaultValue)
      Executes a boolean-returning operation in a confined arena, returning a default value if the operation throws.

      Use this primitive-specialized variant to avoid boxing when wrapping FFM calls whose result is a boolean. The provided arena is closed before this method returns.

      Parameters:
      callable - the operation to execute
      logger - the logger for the calling class
      level - the level at which to log thrown failures
      message - the message to log if the operation throws
      defaultValue - the value to return if the operation throws
      Returns:
      the operation result, or defaultValue if the operation throws

    • runInArenaCatchingThrowable

      public static void runInArenaCatchingThrowable(ForeignFunctions.ArenaRunnable runnable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message)
      Executes an operation in a confined arena, logging and swallowing any thrown failure.

      This helper is intended for FFM operations whose useful result is a side effect. The provided arena is closed before this method returns.

      Parameters:
      runnable - the operation to execute
      logger - the logger for the calling class
      level - the level at which to log thrown failures
      message - the message to log if the operation throws

    • libraryLookup

      public static SymbolLookup libraryLookup(String libraryName)
      Lookup a native library by simple name, mapping it to the platform-specific filename (e.g. "c" → "libc.so" on Linux).
      Parameters:
      libraryName - the platform-independent library name
      Returns:
      the symbol lookup for the library

    • getStructFromNativePointer

      public static MemorySegment getStructFromNativePointer(MemorySegment pointer, StructLayout layout, Arena arena)
      Reinterpret a raw native pointer as a struct of the given layout, scoped to the provided arena.
      Parameters:
      pointer - the native pointer
      layout - the struct layout
      arena - the arena to scope the resulting segment to
      Returns:
      a memory segment over the struct, or null if the pointer is null or MemorySegment.NULL

    • getStringFromNativePointer

      public static String getStringFromNativePointer(MemorySegment pointer, Arena arena)
      Read a null-terminated UTF-8 string from a raw native pointer.
      Parameters:
      pointer - the native pointer
      arena - the arena to scope the reinterpreted segment to
      Returns:
      the Java string, or null if the pointer is null or MemorySegment.NULL

    • getByteArrayFromNativePointer

      public static byte[] getByteArrayFromNativePointer(MemorySegment pointer, long length, Arena arena)
      Copy length bytes from a raw native pointer into a Java byte array.
      Parameters:
      pointer - the native pointer
      length - the number of bytes to copy
      arena - the arena to scope the reinterpreted segment to
      Returns:
      the byte array, or null if the pointer is null or MemorySegment.NULL

    • lib

      public static SymbolLookup lib(String name)
      Lookup a library by name in the global arena.
      Parameters:
      name - the library name
      Returns:
      the symbol lookup for the library

    • downcall

      public static MethodHandle downcall(SymbolLookup lib, String symbol, MemoryLayout resLayout, MemoryLayout... argLayouts)
      Create a downcall handle for a symbol in a library.
      Parameters:
      lib - the symbol lookup
      symbol - the symbol name
      resLayout - the return layout
      argLayouts - the argument layouts
      Returns:
      the method handle

    • getErrno

      public static int getErrno(MemorySegment callState)
      Read the errno value from a captured call state segment.
      Parameters:
      callState - the memory segment returned by a call made with CAPTURE_CALL_STATE
      Returns:
      the errno value
